module.name: host
module.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution. The executor sends preview replies with host System metadata and tool previews, sends unknown-tool failure events, and HostSession builds the server host endpoint from config.server.ip plus config.server.host_port while importing reusable protocol contracts from marix-protocol and config/channel helpers from common.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Executor folder module owning tool preview and host-side tool execution; preview replies send System::new host metadata plus tool preview schema content, failed tool lookups send ExecutionStatus failures, and per-execution updates now carry a 0-based seq with success reporting the expected update count.
